mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_EXER_TRAN ( USER_UUID , EXER_DATE , EXER_STIME , EXER_ETIME , EXER_NAME , EXER_INT , EXER_CNT , REG_DTTM , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{exerDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), #{exerStime}, #{exerEtime}, #{exerName}, #{exerInt}, #{exerCnt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_UUID = #{userUuid}, EXER_DATE = DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(#{exerDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y%m%d'), EXER_STIME = #{exerStime}, EXER_ETIME = #{exerEtime}, EXER_NAME = #{exerName}, EXER_INT = #{exerInt}, EXER_CNT = #{exerCnt}, MOD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT EXER_SEQ AS exerSeq, USER_UUID AS userUuid, EXER_DATE AS exerDate, EXER_STIME AS exerStime, EXER_ETIME AS exerEtime, EXER_NAME AS exerName, EXER_INT AS exerInt, EXER_CNT AS exerCnt FROM T_EXER_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{userUuid} AND EXER_DATE = #{exerDate} AND EXER_STIME = #{exerStime} ORDER BY EXER_SEQ
